center.name: Marmaduke Tunstall
center.summary: Marmaduke Tunstall是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黃腹鷚，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The American pipit (Anthus rubescens), formerly known as the buff-bellied pipit, is a small songbird native to North America
